Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6078 0 0}{f 5 13 22 5 7}Wow, look at that... The color of the sea is so deep...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can feel my bond with Aigis grow[n]stronger as we spend time together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що наші стосунки[n]стануть міцнішими скоро...[n]{f 1 1}
